title: Agentic Workspace Operating Decision
description: Derived internal decision composed from admitted AW authority surfaces. It emits exactly one primary action or one typed blocker.

kind.description: Schema discriminator for the composed operating decision.

decision_id.description: Stable identity derived from input revisions, action, blocker, and terminal state.

status.description: Whether the composed decision exposes an action, a blocker, or no immediate action.

input_revisions.description: Revision or freshness identifiers supplied by specialist authority inputs.

current_work.description: Current-work identity admitted into the composed decision.

selected_owner.description: Selected owner identity admitted into the composed decision.

terminal_state.description: Terminal outcome state used for continuation or finalization claims.

primary_action.description: Exactly one typed primary action when status is actionable; empty otherwise.

external_blocker.description: Exactly one typed blocker when status is blocked; empty otherwise.

blocked_claim_classes.description: Claim classes this decision does not authorize.

provenance.description: Specialist authority inputs and owners preserved for traceability.

replacement_map.description: Compatibility map from older overlapping fields to their derived or demoted source.

additionalProperties.description: Replacement, demotion, or derivation rule for one legacy field.

rule.description: Invariant explaining authority composition and non-inference boundaries.
